seo_title: Interstitial Cystitis After Menopause: Causes, Symptoms, and What Helps
meta_description: Interstitial cystitis worsens after menopause as estrogen decline thins the bladder lining. Learn what IC is, how it differs from UTIs, and what evidence-based interventions help.
